---
title: "Elizabeth Jane Oswald"
---

## Elizabeth Jane Oswald

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1889-91)

### Biography

She wrote on Norse literature and published a travel book,  <i>By Fell and Fjord</i> (1882).

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 28th 1889
- Letter from June 26th [?1882[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
